issues.description: useActiveCompany staleTime is 30s which may feel slow for wallet-switch scenarios. Consider reducing or invalidating on wallet change.

sharedStateObservations.observation: useActiveCompany is now the canonical active-company resolution hook used across all company-scoped surfaces. Workers should always use this rather than direct company queries.

summary: Added tenant-safe active-company resolution with two-stage lookup (onboarding→wallet fallback), 319-line SQL snippet artifact for Paperclip control-plane tables, and updated all shared pages/hooks to use useActiveCompany. 5 new tests cover all resolution paths. Clean implementation with good error handling.
